evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains a repeat block that repeats at least 2 times and plays multiple tracks together using a play_together block

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track 1"
    play "pack/bass_track 1"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains a repeat block that repeats at least 2 times and contains exactly one play block

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains a repeat block, but it either repeats only 1 time or has multiple play blocks that do not play together

Example:
```
repeat 1:
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
```

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
```}
